title: scan_block: tree/witness snapshots not restored on intermediate failures
description: scan_block snapshots self.tree and self.witnesses at entry and restores them on scan_tx error and save_block_state error. But four intermediate paths do NOT restore: (1) spent_note_ids_in failure (line ~497), (2) write_commitment_tree failure (~504), (3) block_height i64 cast failure (~508), (4) write_incremental_witness serialization failure per note (~520). On each of these, scan_block returns Err with the in-memory tree already advanced by scan_tx. On retry, the scanner re-processes the same block against an already-mutated tree, corrupting witness positions for every note discovered in that block → notes become permanently unspendable.
